tin.evidence: TIN digits are visually obscured on sample_data/거주자증명서/4.jpg.

issue_date.evidence: Only `8, 2021` is visible on the source image; the month token is absent.

signed_by.evidence: Item 2 (`has been signed by`) is blank on sample_data/아포스티유 샘플/미국 california 주.png.

issued_on.evidence: Item 6 ends at `the 18th day of` with no month/year on the source image.

issuing_authority.evidence: Item 7 visibly reads `by Deputy Secretary of State, State of California`.
